mapper.select: SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, bbs_oid, menu_type, menu_auth_lv, use_yn, expsr_yn, npag_yn, icon_nm, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY menu_lv, menu_seq, reg_dt

SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, bbs_oid, menu_auth_lv, use_yn, expsr_yn, npag_yn, icon_nm, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE menu_cd = #{menuCd} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, bbs_oid, menu_auth_lv, use_yn, expsr_yn, npag_yn, icon_nm, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE menu_oid = #{menuOid} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.menu ( menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, bbs_oid, menu_auth_lv, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, use_yn, expsr_yn, npag_yn, icon_nm, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt ) VALUES ( #{menuNm}, #{menuPage}, #{menuCd}, #{menuUrl}, #{upMenuOid}, #{menuLv}, #{menuSeq}, #{menuType}, #{bbsOid}, #{menuAuthLv}, #{bbsUseYn}, #{prvcUseYn}, #{useYn}, #{expsrYn}, #{npagYn}, #{iconNm}, #{menuExpln}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{mdfcnId}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.menu
menu_nm = #{menuNm},
menu_page = #{menuPage},
menu_cd = #{menuCd},
menu_url = #{menuUrl},
up_menu_oid = #{upMenuOid},
menu_lv = #{menuLv},
menu_seq = #{menuSeq},
menu_type = #{menuType},
bbs_oid = #{bbsOid},
menu_auth_lv = #{menuAuthLv},
use_yn = #{useYn},
expsr_yn = #{expsrYn},
npag_yn = #{npagYn},
bbs_use_yn = #{bbsUseYn},
prvc_use_yn = #{prvcUseYn},
icon_nm = #{iconNm},
menu_expln = #{menuExpln},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId},
mdfcn_dt = NOW()
WHERE menu_oid = #{menuOid}
UPDATE ${schema}.menu SET use_yn = 'N', mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE menu_oid = #{menuOid}
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( -- root SELECT m.menu_oid, m.menu_nm, m.menu_page, m.menu_cd , m.menu_url, m.up_menu_oid, m.menu_lv, m.menu_seq , m.menu_type, m.menu_auth_lv, m.bbs_use_yn, m.prvc_use_yn, m.use_yn , m.icon_nm, m.menu_expln, m.reg_id, m.reg_dt, m.mdfcn_id, m.mdfcn_dt , CAST(LPAD(m.menu_seq, 3, '0') AS CHAR(100)) AS path , m.bbs_oid, m.expsr_yn, m.npag_yn FROM ${schema}.menu m WHERE m.up_menu_oid IS NULL AND m.use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL -- children SELECT c.menu_oid, c.menu_nm, c.menu_page, c.menu_cd , c.menu_url, c.up_menu_oid, c.menu_lv, c.menu_seq , c.menu_type, c.menu_auth_lv, c.bbs_use_yn, c.prvc_use_yn, c.use_yn , c.icon_nm, c.menu_expln, c.reg_id, c.reg_dt, c.mdfcn_id, c.mdfcn_dt , CONCAT(mt.path, '-', LPAD(c.menu_seq, 3, '0')) , c.bbs_oid, c.expsr_yn, c.npag_yn FROM ${schema}.menu c INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON mt.menu_oid = c.up_menu_oid WHERE c.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd , menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq , menu_type, menu_auth_lv, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, use_yn , icon_nm, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt , bbs_oid, expsr_yn, npag_yn FROM menu_tree WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY path
